tracks.rawText: 4:050 Lead Vocalsv5.5CoverThe song fuses progressive and alternative metal with aggressive, syncopated riffs and abrupt time signature changes, Middle Eastern/Armenian scales color guitar leads and atmospheric passages, while percussive drumming alternates between pounding double-kick and folk-inspired rhythms, Dynamic shifts move from haunting, sparse verses to explosive, multi-layered choruses, featuring complex textures and angular bass lines, Distorted guitars intertwine with brief, dissonant oud or duduk flourishes for ethnic authenticityorbitPublishRemix
tracks.title: 0 Lead Vocals

tracks.rawText: 3:580 Lead Vocalsv5.5CoverCinematic pop with orchestral elements, Features a prominent syncopated synth bassline with a gritty, distorted texture, Percussion consists of a heavy kick drum on beats 1 and 3, layered with cinematic orchestral percussion and a crisp snare, A clean electric guitar plays palm-muted rhythmic patterns in the verses, Orchestral strings provide staccato accents and sustained melodic counterpoints, The female vocals are powerful and belting, characterized by a wide vibrato and dramatic delivery, The arrangement builds with layered vocal harmonies in the chorus, Key of C minor, Tempo is 85 BPM2PublishRemix
tracks.title: 0 Lead Vocals
